label: KDouble
description: This extension for Karoo allows to use custom fields with double types (HR,Power,etc). Includes vertical and horizontal layout, smart fields, rolling fields, W prime, FTP and bell option
releaseNotes: New fields from KSafe (carbs, hydration, calories) and KGhost (ghost gap in seconds/metres) when those extensions are installed. Hydration shows in litres; estimated ghost gap is marked with ~. Several display fixes. If you're app is < 3.4.0 you need to uninstall and install again. Please, write your current conf.
